<div align="center"><center>

## Effect Info

[![Environment](https://img.shields.io/badge/Environment-Client-purple)]() [![Loader](https://img.shields.io/badge/Loader-Fabric-dbd0b4?logo=data:image/png;base64,)](https://fabricmc.net/)

Adds a potency indicator and numerical countdown to status effect icons.

</center></div>
